title: APS Smartphone
description: Add 4 new buttons to your Cobblemon Smartphone!
body:
## APS Smartphone
- -Adds 3 new buttons to the [Cobblemon Smartphone Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-smartphone)
- -New button icons
- -Minior themed Smartphone

# Buttons
- -Worldspawn
- -Return to Bed
- -Newsletter (Admins can add notices)

# Planned Buttons
- -Cobblemon Skin Changer
- -Cobblemon Snap Integration
- -Pokedex with Shiny Dex and Location Info
- -Integration with Trainer Pass
- -Integration with Novaraids
- -Badge Box
- -Integration with FTB Quests
